title: Reduce Integration Tail And Tier Tests
summary: Cuts the slow integration tail by removing redundant end-to-end coverage, reusing prepared baselines, and clarifying fast-versus-slow test boundaries.
scope_items: Remove or downgrade redundant high-cost integration and end-to-end cases that no longer add unique contract coverage.
Reuse cached fixture baselines and reduce repeated full coordination or closeout rebuilds inside tests.
done_when_items: The slowest integration test families are materially narrower or cheaper without losing real contract coverage.
The suite has a clearer fast-versus-slow boundary or an explicit justification for any remaining tail.
